description.en: Gets and sets theAnimationEffectassociated with this animation. This will usually be aKeyframeEffectobject.

excerpt.es: Gets and sets theAnimationEffectassociated with this animation. This will usually be aKeyframeEffectobject.
excerpt.en: Gets and sets theAnimationEffectassociated with this animation. This will usually be aKeyframeEffectobject.

description.en: Afloatgiving the amount of time the animation has been running, in seconds, when this event fired, excluding any time the animation was paused. For ananimationstartevent,elapsedTimeis0.0unless there was a negative value foranimation-delay, in which case the event will be fired withelapsedTimecontaining(-1 * delay).

description.en: Returns aCSSNumericValuerepresenting the ending (100% progress) scroll position of the timeline as an offset from the start of the overflowing section of content in the scroller.

excerpt.es: Returns aCSSNumericValuerepresenting the ending (100% progress) scroll position of the timeline as an offset from the start of the overflowing section of content in the scroller.
